---
title: "Tunnel Marathon Course Recon: 53 Miles Over Two Sundays"
description: "10th marathon since January, run as a recon of the August Tunnel Marathon course — 26.69 miles one weekend, 26.39 the next, both halves of the course in opposite directions."
author: "synesis"
date: "2024-07-14"
categories: [running, marathon, video, personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![[Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/IjlEx1v2XUs)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Running milestone: today I ran my 10th marathon since January this year ([first marathon, January](../20240114-first-marathon-pacific-northwest/))! 🙂

In preparation for the Tunnel Marathon this August (<https://www.tunnelmarathon.com/>), I started running its course last Sunday, first from its starting point to the midpoint and back, then running from its finish point to the midpoint and back today:

Part 1 - Starting at Palouse to Cascades State Park due west and back: distance 26.69 miles, descend first 967ft/295m then ascend ("V"). Moving time was 4:45:32, pace 10:42/mi. There was a 2-mile run through a pitch-black tunnel at the beginning -- fun!

Part 2 - Starting at Dahlgren Family Park @ North Bend due south/east and back: distance 26.39 miles, ascend first 1,163ft/354m then descend (inverted "V"). Moving time was 4:00:12, pace 9:06/mi.

On both days the sun was HOT and I started wearing water vest filled w/ 1.2~1.5L electrolyte water.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_running-marathon-activity-7218483758524456961-5feH).*
